# Copilot Instructions

- Keep repository claims evidence-based and conservative.
- Do not present investigational logic as a confirmed runtime fix.
- When changing affordability logic, update the docs and patch registry with the
  same change.
- Prefer narrow Harmony patches over broad behavioral rewrites unless a Burst or
  call-site constraint makes helper patching impractical.
- Preserve the distinction between effective income, liquid wealth, and actual
  cash payouts.
